title: begonia × urania
intro: Begonia × urania, also known as Begonia x urania, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Begoniaceae family, resulting from the cross between Begonia obliqua and Begonia coccinea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Begonia × urania include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which help to protect against cell damage, reduce inflammation, and fight off infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
